'''âj-w-t-l''' ('''kajawteloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vascularize|vascularize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vascularize|vascularize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-w-t-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajawteloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijawteloko|thijawteloko]] || [[word:jijawteloko|jijawteloko]] || [[word:shijawteloko|shijawteloko]] || [[word:kijawteloko|kijawteloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajawteloko|thajawteloko]] || [[word:jajawteloko|jajawteloko]] || [[word:shajawteloko|shajawteloko]] || [[word:kajawteloko|kajawteloko]]
